meta.run_description: Backtest using engine=both, universe=full (503 symbols), period=2016-04-25..2026-04-25, benchmark=SPY.

run_config.run_description: Backtest using engine=both, universe=full (503 symbols), period=2016-04-25..2026-04-25, benchmark=SPY.

user_inputs.run_description: Backtest using engine=both, universe=full (503 symbols), period=2016-04-25..2026-04-25, benchmark=SPY.

meta.entry_rules: Signals generated by bull/weak engines; entries at next session open when signal date regime matches engine.
meta.exit_rules: Gap-aware execution: SL/TP can trigger at open on gap-through, otherwise intraday High/Low checks for TP/SL, else planned exit date close fallback.

signal_triggers.bull_engine: In bull regime, signal when close is near 20-day breakout level (close >= high_20d * 0.995) and liquidity/fundamental filters pass.
signal_triggers.weak_engine: In weak regime, signal when close <= lower Bollinger Band and RSI14 <= weak threshold, with liquidity/fundamental filters pass.

meta.regime_filter_logic: Regime filter uses SPY vs SMA200: Bull engine above SMA200, Weak engine below SMA200.
meta.signal_price_vs_pnl_price: Signals use adjusted-close indicators; portfolio fills use raw OHLC with slippage and commissions.
meta.intraday_exit_priority: If both SL and TP touch intraday on same bar, stop-loss is prioritized (conservative assumption).

metric_definitions.benchmark_total_return_pct: SPY buy-and-hold over same period using Adj Close when available
metric_definitions.benchmark_cagr_pct: SPY CAGR over same period using elapsed_days / 365.25
